# netbox_tenant (Resource)

Manages a NetBox tenant (organization).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a new tenant
resource "netbox_tenant" "example" {
  name        = "example-tenant"
  slug        = "example-tenant"
  description = "Example tenant for demonstration"
  comments    = "Created by Terraform"

  tags = [
    {
      name = "terraform"
      slug = "terraform"
    }
  ]
}

# Use existing tenant with upsert
resource "netbox_tenant" "existing" {
  name   = "existing-tenant"
  slug   = "existing-tenant"
  upsert = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the tenant.

### Optional

- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the tenant.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this tenant. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing tenant with matching name instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug for the tenant. Auto-generated by NetBox from name.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
